text: Mamdani says New York City can't arrest Netanyahu but the federal government should - NPR
fullText: New York Mayor Mamdani said the city would not be able to execute an arrest warrant issued by the top war-crimes court for Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu, but urged the federal government to do so.

text: Kaylee Hottle, deaf ‘Godzilla’ actor, killed in car crash at 18 - CNN

text: Trump Sets 100% Tariff on Generic Drugs With Two-Year Delay - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Generic drug manufacturers will have two years to move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said, threatening the supply of low-cost medicines that millions of Americans rely on.

text: Australian woman gives birth to rare identical quadruplet daughters - CBS News
fullText: All four daughters share 100 percent of their DNA after a single fertilized egg split into four embryos, making the pregnancy a one-in-15-million occurrence.
